<?php namespace Faker\Provider\el_CY; class PhoneNumber extends \Faker\Provider\PhoneNumber { protected static $formats = [ '+3572#######', '+3579#######', '2#######', '9#######', ]; /** * An array of el_CY mobile (cell) phone number formats. * * @var array */ protected static $mobileFormats = [ '9#######', ]; /** * Return a el_CY mobile phone number. * * @return string */ public static function mobileNumber() { return static::numerify(static::randomElement(static::$mobileFormats)); } }
